content.summary: Singleton system COMP providing UI popups (PopMenu, PopDialog), HTTP client (WebClient), file download (FileDownloader), and mouse input (MouseCHOP). Accessed via op.TDResources.
warnings: Access via op.TDResources — do NOT use 'import TDResources'. This is a singleton COMP, not a Python module.
PopMenu supports max 2 nesting levels for submenus.
PopDialog supports max 4 buttons — additional buttons are silently ignored.
WebClient callback receives statusCode=None on timeout/connection failure — always check before using.
FileDownloader with force=False skips download if localPath already exists.

members.name: PopMenu.Open
members.description: Opens a popup menu. Submenus via nested lists (max 2 levels). Callback receives info dict with index (-1 if dismissed) and item.

parameters.name: menuItems
parameters.description: List of str or nested lists for submenus (max 2 levels)

parameters.name: callbackDetails
parameters.description: Arbitrary data passed through to callback

warnings: Callback receives index=-1 when dismissed without selection

members.name: PopDialog.Open
members.signature: op.TDResources.op('popDialog').Open(text='', title='', buttons=['OK'], callback=None, textEntry=False, default='', escButton=2, enterButton=1, escOnClickAway=True)
members.description: Opens a popup dialog with configurable buttons and optional text entry field.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: function(info) where info = {'button': str, 'buttonNum': int, 'enteredText': str}

warnings: Max 4 buttons — additional buttons are silently ignored

members.name: WebClient.Request
members.signature: op.TDResources.op('webClient').Request(callback, url, method='GET', header=None, data=None, contentType=None, id=None)
members.description: Sends an HTTP request. Callback receives (statusCode, headerDict, data, id). statusCode is None on timeout/connection failure. data is bytes.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: HTTP method: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, HEAD

examples.label: Handle None status on timeout

warnings: statusCode is None on timeout/connection failure — always check
data is bytes — decode with data.decode('utf-8') for text

members.name: FileDownloader.Download
members.description: Downloads a file from URL to localPath. dwnldCopy=True uses temp file to avoid partial writes. uploadFile repurposes as PUT upload.

parameters.name: localPath
parameters.description: Local file path to save to

parameters.name: dwnldCopy
parameters.description: Download to temp first, then copy (safer for large files)

parameters.name: uploadFile
parameters.description: Path to file — sends PUT with file body (upload, not download)

warnings: force=False skips download if localPath already exists
uploadFile repurposes this as a PUT upload — url becomes the upload target

members.name: ButtonPopMenu
members.description: Variant of PopMenu attached to a button widget. Does NOT support submenus.

members.name: MouseCHOP
members.description: A Mouse In CHOP providing mouse position (tx, ty), button state (lselect, mselect, rselect), and scroll wheel delta. Access via op.TDResources.op('mouseCHOP').

examples.code:
mouse = op.TDResources.op('mouseCHOP')
x = mouse['tx']
y = mouse['ty']
left_click = mouse['lselect']
examples.label: Read mouse position and button state
